name: lock file rejects an unknown section name not in the registered fifteen-section list
command: printf '{"_locks":{"made-up-section":{"holder":"x","expires":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}}}\n' > lock.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-lock.sh" --lock lock.json --check section-names 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_section=made-up-section' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
